info.name: Hookdeck Integrations API
info.description:
Configure platform integrations that adapt Hookdeck behavior for specific source platforms — including signature verification, header normalization, and platform-aware retries.

Contact Support:
 Name: Hookdeck Support
 Email: info@hookdeck.com
